overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime drive through a foggy, neon-lit dystopian city. The vehicle navigates urban intersections, merges onto an elevated highway, crosses a massive suspension bridge with red aviation lights, and emerges into the open Badlands terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with gas station and digital billboards

events.description: vehicle stopped at red traffic light at intersection
traffic light changes to green and vehicle proceeds through intersection
vehicle makes left turn at intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at red light then proceeding through intersection and executing left turn

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead waiting at red light before proceeding through intersection

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with red and white circular logo atop building
commercial fuel station with illuminated canopy and signage
tall traffic signal showing red light above intersection
tropical trees lining the street near commercial buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle waits at a red light in a foggy urban intersection surrounded by neon-lit commercial buildings. A large circular digital billboard dominates the right side. As the light changes, the vehicle proceeds and turns left, navigating through the wet streets of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street transitioning to highway on-ramp

events.description: passing large vertical advertisement tower and leaving intersection behind
merging onto highway ramp from city street

agents.ego_description: accelerating through city streets and merging onto the highway ramp

entered.detail: tall illuminated billboard structure displaying advertisements
large directional signage indicating highway routes
safety barriers lining the highway ramp entrance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates past a towering vertical advertisement structure on the left, leaving the commercial intersection behind. The scene transitions from city streets to a highway on-ramp, with concrete barriers and overhead signage becoming prominent as the vehicle merges onto the elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated suspension bridge with red aviation warning lights

events.description: entering the elevated highway bridge structure
approaching massive bridge tower with red aviation lights in heavy fog

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed across the foggy suspension bridge, passing under overhead signs

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead maintaining speed on the bridge deck

entered.detail: overhead highway sign indicating direction to Santo Domingo district
massive concrete bridge support structure with red warning lights
thick suspension cables extending from bridge towers
bright red warning lights atop bridge towers piercing through fog

segments.scene_description: The vehicle speeds across a massive suspension bridge enveloped in thick fog. Red aviation lights glow atop the bridge towers, cutting through the haze. Overhead signs indicate directions to Santo Domingo as the vehicle passes beneath the bridge's structural elements, with suspension cables visible against the dark sky.

events.description: exiting the bridge structure into open terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing on highway as urban infrastructure gives way to open desert landscape

entered.detail: wide open road stretching into the distance with minimal structures
rocky desert terrain and sparse vegetation of the Badlands

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the bridge structure into the expansive openness of the Badlands. The dense urban fog gives way to clearer night air as the highway stretches forward through barren desert terrain. Sparse streetlights line the road while rocky formations and desert scrubland become visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban intersection into the vast, desolate expanse of the Badlands. It begins with the vehicle waiting at a red light amidst foggy commercial buildings and a dominant circular digital billboard before turning left through wet city streets. As the vehicle accelerates past a towering vertical advertisement, the scene shifts from the dense city center to a highway on-ramp characterized by concrete barriers and overhead signage. The camera then carries the vehicle across a massive suspension bridge enveloped in thick fog, where red aviation lights glow through the haze beneath structural cables and signs for Santo Domingo. Finally, the dense urban fog clears as the vehicle exits the bridge, emerging into the open night air of a barren desert terrain lined with sparse streetlights and rocky formations.
